name: Paginated

unions.name: Request
unions.comment: Encapsulates an API request for a list of items of type `a`.

aliases.name: RequestOptions
aliases.type: { method : String, headers : List Header, url : String, body : Body, decoder : Decoder a, timeout : Maybe Time, withCredentials : Bool }

values.name: post
values.type: String -> Body -> Decoder a -> Request a

values.name: request
values.comment:
Create a custom request, allowing the specification of HTTP
headers and other options. For example:

    Paginated.request
        { method = "GET"
        , headers = [Http.header "Private-Token" "XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX"]
        , url = url
        , body = Http.emptyBody
        , decoder = decoder
        , timeout = Nothing
        , withCredentials = False
        }

values.name: send
values.type: (Result Error (List a) -> msg) -> Request a -> Cmd msg

values.name: toTask
values.comment:
Convert a `Request` into a `Task`.

This is only really useful if you want to chain together a bunch of
requests (or any other tasks) in a single command.
